plugins.name: kcc-core
plugins.description: Core plugin: top-level context injections and shared commands / skills.

plugins.name: kcc-dev-core
plugins.description: Development-focused plugin: conditionally injects code-discipline principles when the session is inside a software project, and hosts standalone dev skills (write-spec, write-acceptance-criteria) and hooks.

plugins.name: kcc-testing
plugins.description: LLM-executable manual QA test case authoring — write-test-cases skill turns a PRD into a YAML coverage set.

plugins.name: kcc-backlog
plugins.description: Record work items the user wants to defer and recover them later. Silent-by-default.

plugins.name: kcc-design
plugins.description: Cross-platform UI decomposer. The decompose-design skill breaks 1..N UI artifacts (web / iOS / Android) into a uniform per-facet tree (attributes / layout / motion) with nested property-value detail — facts only, no classification, no recommendations, no code generation.
